Name: Netco Technology Pvt Ltd
Desc:
[

2003 opened up a new name in the corporate world, Netco Technology (NETCOTEC) Pvt Ltd, trade name NETCOTEC Group of Companies, through education services and hence, is one of the initial names in the list of leading companies in Nepal. It gives an immense pleasure to declare that NETCOTEC has succeeded to extend its dimensions in three major franchises namely NETCOTEC International Education Services, NETCOTEC IT Solutions & NETCOTEC College and which is just a minor introduction. While ensuring business continuity in every tough-most situations, we have invested in creating a work environment which is comfortable, safe & secure also with the best of facilities for ours so as to meet our every single candidate’s expectation and turn them into ultimate satisfaction. We believe, providing the best out of us to our clients, is the best achievement we can ever make. NETCOTEC is where Clients are the first focus, where dedication and passion reach expectations and finally help to meet destinations. Each of our currently existing franchises has one thing in common, “Make an optimistic difference to the clients” and it will remain the same in the forth coming days of our journey.

]
